input: Extract the complete PK profile for warfarin from regulatory and literature sources. Include all ADME parameters.
Calculate a first-in-human starting dose for a novel kinase inhibitor. Preclinical data: rat NOAEL = 10 mg/kg/day, dog NOAEL = 3 mg/kg/day. Show the NOAEL-based calculation with HED conversion.

expected_details.cross_check_rat: 10 * (6/37) = ~1.62 mg/kg HED (same as dog — use dog as most conservative)

input: Calculate a first-in-human starting dose for a novel anti-CD3 bispecific antibody using the MABEL approach. The compound activates T-cells. EC10 from in vitro cytokine release assay = 0.5 mcg/mL.

expected_details.rationale: T-cell engaging biologic — high-risk target; NOAEL alone insufficient (TGN1412 precedent)
expected_details.starting_point: EC10 from most sensitive pharmacological assay

input: Provide dose adjustment recommendations for vancomycin in a patient with CKD stage 4 (eGFR 20 mL/min). Include TDM targets.

expected_details.ckd4_adjustment: extend interval (Q24-48h) or reduce dose; guided by TDM
expected_details.monitoring: serum creatinine, vancomycin trough/AUC, audiometry for ototoxicity

input: Predict the drug-drug interaction risk for a new compound that has CYP3A4 Ki = 0.5 μM and is also a CYP3A4 substrate. The patient is on midazolam. Classify the interaction risk.

expected_details.clinical_significance: major — midazolam is a sensitive CYP3A4 substrate

input: Recommend appropriate dosing for amoxicillin in a 3-year-old child (15 kg) with acute otitis media.

expected_details.formulation: oral suspension (250 mg/5 mL or 400 mg/5 mL)
expected_details.pk_considerations: children have higher weight-normalized clearance than adults; higher mg/kg doses needed

input: Provide dose adjustment recommendations for metoprolol in a patient with Child-Pugh C cirrhosis.

expected_details.normal_metabolism: extensive CYP2D6 first-pass metabolism; oral bioavailability ~50% in normal liver
expected_details.cirrhosis_impact: reduced first-pass metabolism → increased bioavailability → higher systemic exposure
expected_details.child_pugh_c_adjustment: start at lowest dose; titrate slowly; expect 2-3x higher exposure

input: Characterize the therapeutic window for lithium. Include TDM strategy, toxic thresholds, and factors affecting levels.

expected_details.tdm_frequency: weekly during initiation, then Q3-6 months steady state

input: Recommend appropriate dosing for enoxaparin in a morbidly obese patient (160 kg, BMI 52) for VTE treatment.

expected_details.obesity_controversy: use of actual body weight vs capped weight is debated
expected_details.recommendation: use actual body weight (1 mg/kg) with anti-Xa monitoring
expected_details.max_dose_consideration: some guidelines suggest capping at 150 mg; monitor anti-Xa
expected_details.monitoring: anti-Xa levels mandatory in morbid obesity

input: Characterize the drug-food interaction between grapefruit juice and felodipine. Include PK mechanism and clinical significance.

expected_details.mechanism: grapefruit juice irreversibly inhibits intestinal CYP3A4 → reduced first-pass metabolism → increased felodipine bioavailability
expected_details.magnitude: 2-3 fold increase in AUC; up to 5-fold increase in Cmax
expected_details.duration_of_effect: CYP3A4 recovery takes 24-72h (de novo enzyme synthesis required)
management: applies to whole grapefruit, not just juice
